ReceiptRegistry.note: V1; stays live for the existing anchored receipts (chain history immutable; current count auto-derived in docs/numbers.json). New anchors land on ReceiptRegistryV2.

ReceiptRegistryV2.note: K-2 fix · EIP-712 anchor signature recovery · agentAddress is the recovered signer (NOT msg.sender). Per-agent monotonic nonces. See HALF_BAKED.md K-2. Stays live for the 7 V2-anchored receipts; new anchors with slots 10/11/12 land on ReceiptRegistryV3.

ReceiptRegistryV3.note: B-V2-32 fix · admits receipt-type slots 10 (doc_room_create), 11 (doc_room_read), 12 (memory_consolidation) that V2 capped at 9. EIP-712 version bumped to '3' so V2 signatures cannot replay (domain separator differs). 6 Foundry tests in ReceiptRegistryV3.t.sol all PASS. Deployed iter-78 of cron c25a7e8b run; closes USER_TODO §B-V2-32.

Erc7857Verifier.note: V1 verifier reused by AgentPassportINFTV2 — see HALF_BAKED.md H-6 (TEE/ZKP-backed attestor is Phase B; current attestor signature scheme is honest documented limitation).

AgentPassportINFT.note: V1; stays live for 4 minted passports (tokenIds 1-4). New mints land on AgentPassportINFTV2. Studio /agents reads V2 first; V1 rows render with a LEGACY-PASSPORT chip.

AgentPassportINFTV2.note: K-1 + K-4 + K-6 fix · authorizedRecorders-only with ReceiptRegistryV2 cross-check + ±100 trustScoreDelta cap; per-token executorVersion bumps on transfer; mint sets passportOf before _safeMint + nonReentrant.

CapabilityRegistry.note: V1; stays live for any existing grants. New grants land on CapabilityRegistryV2.

CapabilityRegistryV2.note: B-V2-15 · private reverse indexes (social-graph leak fix · planning-003 §A.5.10) + authorizedRelayers gate on consumeRead (HALF_BAKED §K-22 DoS fix). 14 Foundry tests all PASS. Post-deploy: operator wallet 0xaa95...77Ce must be added via addAuthorizedRelayer so the off-chain memory engine continues to function.

MemoryAccessLog.note: V1; stays live for any existing log entries (chain history immutable). New writes land on MemoryAccessLogV2.

MemoryAccessLogV2.note: B-V2-16 · HALF_BAKED §K-23 fix. logAccess now enforces msg.sender == agent (self-log path) OR CapabilityRegistryV2.isValid(grantId, msg.sender, scopeHash) cross-check (grant-backed path). Random wallets revert. V2 capability registry pinned at construction; passes the cross-check for grants on the V2 registry only. 10/10 Foundry tests PASS.
